assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions testing on dev clusters first and staggers prod cluster upgrades, acknowledging the different release channels

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Includes dedicated Autopilot-specific section noting no direct node access, Google manages nodes, and proper resource requests/limits needed

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Mentions checking for deprecated APIs but doesn't provide specific kubectl commands to check for API deprecations

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'Verify workload resource requests/limits are properly set' in Autopilot-specific section

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Includes PodDisruptionBudgets, graceful shutdown handling, and readiness/liveness probes in the pre-upgrade checklist

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Includes 'kubectl version --short' command to validate cluster version after upgrade

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Comprehensive post-upgrade validation including pod health, application endpoints, services, and performance monitoring

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: First item in pre-upgrade checklist is to upgrade dev clusters first and run full test suite

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Does not mention the GKE release schedule or advance notice timeframes beyond the immediate upgrade notification
Includes monitoring setup, alerting configuration, dashboard preparation, and post-upgrade monitoring validation

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: Does not mention node-level maintenance exclusions, correctly focusing on Autopilot's managed nature
